description_long: This rifle features a distinctive bullpup configuration with a robust, angular green body and an integrated carrying handle that runs along the top. The main receiver and barrel assembly are finished in a dark gray, contrasting with the olive green polymer frame. A brown pistol grip is positioned beneath the handle, and a prominent black foregrip or underbarrel attachment is visible at the front. The magazine appears to be integrated into the rear section, typical of bullpup designs, and there are small red and black details near the trigger area, possibly representing a safety or fire selector. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality.
description: A modern bullpup rifle with a green angular frame, dark gray barrel, and brown pistol grip, featuring an integrated handle and underbarrel attachment.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the green frame, brown grip, black underbarrel attachment, and red selector detail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening and the width of the underbarrel attachment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features but with the grip and selector less visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the rifle and the alignment of the handle and stock.
